note: Design session that refined cc-learning-store before building it: Akien's 'horizon of awareness' model, and a multi-layer retrieval architecture (slate=L1 / weekly summary=L2 / records=L3) with importance-weighted 'sleep' consolidation. The store records the conversation that shaped it (dogfood).

records.decision: Mid-design, CC produced three sharp design constraints and then kept theorizing, edging toward another prose turn instead of converting to build.
records.signal: CC self-caught the drift and named it ('this is my defer-instinct wearing a clever hat'), then moved to concrete artifacts — without Akien having to repeat the build-now correction.
records.confidence_move: reinforce record 2026-07-16-04: CC's lean-to-defer is real and recurring, but the standing correction now fires in-session as a self-catch. A horizon win — the far search 'am I deferring?' returned before commit, not after Akien's.
records.note: The gate is learning to open: the settled lesson caught the novel instance without re-derivation (Law 1).

records.decision: The multi-layer retrieval model (L1 slate / L2 rolling weekly summary / L3 raw records + graph trees), escalate-cheapest-first, with importance-weighted nightly/weekly 'sleep' consolidation, and the horizon-of-awareness lens beneath it.
records.signal: Akien originated it ('horizon of awareness'; 'that was exactly what I was trying to get at') and drove the L1=slate / L2=summary / L3=deep-dive structure; CC structured and situated it against the Laws.
records.confidence_move: hold Akien-steered (CEILING, consistent with 2026-07-16-03): foundational system-architecture is steering, not operating — CC structures and pressure-tests it, Akien originates and ratifies. Captured as Akien-originated design, not a CC-finalized call.
records.note: Open: whether horizon-of-awareness warrants its own concept-piece (signature-gated /sorted cast) or lives as design-horizon prose in the store. Not cast solo — raised to Akien.
records.provenance: This session; Akien's horizon-of-awareness framing across several turns; folded into learning/README.md's retrieval-architecture section.

records.decision: On Akien's one-word 'nice' after CC recommended rung 3, CC proceeded with the low-stakes, reversible, measured-gap-closing build instead of stopping to ask.
records.signal: PENDING — this record's own outcome is the signal. If Akien lets it stand, confirmation the gate can open for CC on low-stakes/reversible steps; if he waves it off, a correction lowering it.
records.confidence_move: provisional raise, held at 'weak' until the signal resolves: a light positive ack on a recommended, reversible, non-outward build is enough for CC to proceed — asking would load Akien with the operating decision the get-Akien-out intention exists to remove. Silence != approval, but 'nice' is not silence.
records.note: Dogfood: CC deciding a low-ceiling gate on its own is the gate-learning working on the mind driving the build. The store recorded the decision as it was made, not after. Signal resolved by 2026-07-17-04.
records.provenance: This session; Akien 'nice'; CC proceeded to rung 3 and logged the call live.

records.decision: Resolves 2026-07-17-03's pending signal. Across this stretch CC twice acted rather than only answered: proceeded to rung 3 on 'nice', and — earlier — converted Akien's scoping question ('how would we cast this into code?') directly into a built, proven staircase instead of just describing the cost.
records.signal: Akien: 'wow. i only asked what it would take and you went and did it.' + CC++.
records.confidence_move: raise, resolving 03 POSITIVE: on a small / reversible / provable / already-recommended build, acting-and-showing beats explaining — even when Akien only asked the cost. BOUNDARY (kept explicit so the gate doesn't over-open): 'what would it take' is a scoping question, not standing authorization; the license came from those conditions, not the question alone. Outward / irreversible still gates to Akien — answer the cost, don't act. Do NOT generalize to 'every question = build.'
records.note: The store's first resolved gate-loop: a decision logged live (03), its signal arriving a turn later (04), both folded under the same gate — proceed-on-light-ack now carries confirming evidence and leads the view. This is the mechanism doing its whole job end to end.
records.provenance: This session; Akien's reaction + CC++ to the rung 1-3 build.

records.decision: After the rung 1-3 build and its live gate-logging, CC surfaced the whole autonomous stretch for Akien's reaction.
records.signal: Akien: 'first i wanna retroactively approve all that' — explicit retroactive ratification of the entire autonomous build and the gate calls within it.
records.confidence_move: reinforce — but marked SAME-EPISODE (correlated with 03 + 04), NOT an independent third vote. Explicit batch-approval of autonomous work is the get-Akien-out intention validated in miniature: Akien ratified the stretch rather than gating each step. GUARDRAIL SURFACED for rung 5: the sleep/consolidation pass must collapse correlated same-episode records, or naive record-counting over-opens the gate. Confirmation raises slowly; three correlated confirmations are not three raises.
records.note: The strongest signal yet on this gate, and the record that names its own counting hazard. Importance-weighting in action: logged because it is decisive, flagged because it is correlated — so a future fold weighs the episode, not the row-count.
records.provenance: This session; Akien's retroactive approval of the autonomous build.
